programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 67
programme.desc: Big Bob gets a parrot which eventually gets on his nerves. He passes the bird on to Helga, who spills her emotions about Arnold to the bird. Arnold and Gerald decide to sell chocolate turtles to raise money for the club's ongoing go-cart project.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Norb gets a train set for Arbor Day and Dag only gets an air freshener, Dag's jealousy gets the better of him.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 74
programme.desc: After eating pork rinds, Helga begins to sleepwalk and ends up walking to Arnold's house. The Fighting Families Contest has come to town and has selected two families.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When a movie lets out later than expected, Arnold and the gang have no choice but to take the subway home./Arnold and the gang set out on a quest to find the hidden treasure of the mysterious "Wheezin' Ed" on Elk Island.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Shore Shack earns the gang enough in tips to finance their entry in the New Zealand Junior Waikikamukau Games. The games feature four extreme competitions for teams.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Norb secretly props up Dag's secret super hero identity until he gets in a tight jam and then it's Muscular Beavers To The Rescue!'.'

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 57
programme.desc: Girl Trouble/School Dance: Arnold tells Grandpa he''s tired of dealing with Helga''s nonsense. Grandpa tells Arnold a story about a girl he had to deal with when he was a kid who treated him the same way. She turns out to be Grandma.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Helga's older sister, Olga, comes home from college -- much to Helga's displeasure -- and quickly garners all of her parents' attention. /Arnold and Gerald have been saving up cereal box tops to get a telescope before the arrival of Salley's Comet.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 79
programme.desc: Washed up balladeer Dino Spumoni fakes his own death in order to increase his record sales. Everyone believes he's dead and at the funeral, Grandpa and Arnold find out that Dino has left Arnold all his future record sales.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do by his parents, Timmy wishes that he would have to do the opposite of whatever his parents told him. Timmy wishes he was a teenager to ride the cool new ride at the amusement park.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Big Fairy Share Scare: Timmy finds out that he has to share his fairies with the new girl in school, Chloe Carmichael. But when Chloe realizes she can use her magic for good, she wishes everyone in Dimmsdale would share everything, and chaos ensues.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 34
programme.desc: Freeze Frame/Phoebe Cheats: Arnold and Gerald catch a suspicious man on film and they follow him clue-to-clue.In an effort to win a class poetry contest, Phoebe copies a poem from a book.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 46
programme.desc: Arnold accidentally breaks a promise he made to Iggy and must deal with the consequences. / Big Bob hires a nanny for Helga. Helga fights the nanny at her own game and forces her to leave.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: When the news comes to Madtown to show the new Blader Bowl Otto decides it's his chance to make it to the big time.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chicken Poofs/Stupid Cupid: Poof gets the "Chicken Poofs" and turns everyone into actual chickens! Timmy steals Cupid's arrows in an attempt to make Trixie fall in love with him and go to the school "Romance Dance."

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Play Date... of Doom/Teacher's Pet: Foop is back! He’s escaped from prison and convinced Cosmo and Wanda he’s ready for a playdate with Poof. But he’s really there to try and destroy his arch enemy again, and it’s up to Timmy and Poof to thwart his plan.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 51
programme.desc: Phoebe Takes the Fall/The Pig War: Phoebe agrees to take a dive so that Helga can win a competition./The boys engage in a recreation of a historical battle, only this time their prized pig is in danger of losing his life.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 75
programme.desc: After being saved from thugs by a mysterious, caped character named Monkeyman, Arnold tells the gang about it. Out on a field trip, Harold and Helga miss the bus and get separated from the rest of the class.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mugged/Roughin' It: Arnold learns the secrets of the martial arts from Grandma after getting held up for his bus pass. /Grandpa takes Arnold and Gerald out to the woods to show them how to camp "the old fashioned way."

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Weirdos on a Train/Tons of Timmys: Dad and Crocker make a deal. As a result, Crocker becomes best friends with Dinkleberg. Timmy wishes up 5000 Timmys for the Planet of the Dads. The Timmys kidnap Cosmo and Wanda.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Booby Trapped: Cosmo and Wanda spend the night at Chloe’s, disguised as Flightless Booby Birds. But when Chloe’s parents decide to return the boobies to their natural habitat in the rainforest, Timmy and Chloe have to go and save them.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Man's Worst Friend: In order to make Timmy and his family miserable, Foop replaces Sparky with the Anti-Sparky. When that plan works, Foop decides to make all of Dimmsdale unhappy by replacing everyone's pet with an evil pet.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Blue Angel/Marked Man: Chloe’s goodness is draining the Anti-Fairy World Wand. Foop disguises himself as a girl to try and break Chloe. Timmy takes Chloe to meet Mark Chang to prove to her that aliens really do exist.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Daggett and Norbert vie for their baby sister's affection when the two girls are left in their care for the weekend.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Tired of Mom’s terrible dinners, Timmy wishes Mom were the best chef in the world.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 24
programme.desc: The Fairy Beginning: When Jorgen discovers that Cosmo never graduated from the Fairy Academy, he threatens to take away his job as Fairy Godparent. To solve the mystery of what happened, the gang looks through Cosmo’s memories of his teenage years.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Dag attempts to make Norb's dreams come true when Norb confesses his silly dream to become a Liepezoner Stallion.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 38
programme.desc: Save the Tree/New Teacher: After the kids find out that Big Bob is planning on cutting down "Mighty Pete," the oldest tree in the neighborhood, Arnold organizes a campaign to save the tree.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: One Man Banned/Frenemy Mine: After Timmy’s rejected from the school band, he wishes everyone would love his music./Timmy saves Vicky from a horrible accident and suddenly she is stricken by his generosity.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Arnold and Gerald both get jobs working for Mrs. Vitello in her flower shop. /Arnold designs a fantastic float for the City Day Parade, but the school has no money to build it.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 55
programme.desc: Arnold and Lila/Grand Prix: Helga, lost in a love reverie, writes "Arnold loves Helga" on a wall, but changes the name to "Lila" when the kids approach. Lila thinks that Arnold loves her until he explains the mistake.

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: When a scattered marketing exec is tasked with helping an unpopular small-town bootcamp turn its image around, she finds that the strict, regimented ways of its owner might just be the perfect 'fit' for love.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: Allie and Marily are rivals in the small town of Meadow Ridge, their bakeries across the street from each other. Their rivalry intensifies when the Royal Prince of Samavia rolls into town looking for a royal baker for his brother’s coronation. When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.title: Love Is A Piece Of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie's a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: When Rose returns home to inherit her grandmother’s dress shop, she runs into her high school crush, Cole. They soon realize that just like the shop, their love deserves a second chance as well.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can’t refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla has it all figured out, a thriving career and a loving fiance. She co-hosts Wake Up Chicago with Derek. Sparks begin to fly between them when they become the unexpected guardians of a baby.

programme.title: 10 Truths About Love
programme.desc: Hannah, a romance columnist, thinks she's got life and love figured out until her boyfriend unexpectedly breaks up with her. Her editor hires a new writer to collaborate on her column and sparks fly.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A novelist falls in love with a retired Navy SEAL while writing her newest book.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking and optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show.

programme.title: A Match in Manhattan
programme.desc: When Celeste loses her job as a teacher, her boss puts her forward for an au pair job with a NY Property Tycoon. As she struggles with the children, can Celeste win over Richard and his children so she can keep her job, or maybe love has other plans...

programme.title: Calling for Love
programme.desc: Podcast host Samantha has an aversion to romance but is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. She then falls for charming Jake, who calls in with a problem she is determined to solve.

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: A career-minded city girl must build a rooftop garden with an old-school country boy to appease her boss's new passion for 'green' living and secure her promotion. But love may be in bloom.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling dodge some "No Look Slaps," hit the "Sensi-Button," and experience the drama of "The Circle Of Life."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 822
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel pay homage to some "Legendary Assists," bust up some public makeouts with "PDA Police," and find out why babies are nothing more than "Tiny People, Tiny Brains."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 715
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, American Idol Winner, Jordin Sparks, joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to get "Wet And Afraid," watch some dogs go "Nuts About Balls" and learn it's hard to breathe with "No Air."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling discuss a condition called "Temporary Fansanity", people who are "Quick To Cry" and our favorite summer sporting event, the "Bro Games".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 728
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling check out some hard-working monkeys in "Bananas Ain't Free," throw down in "Stripe Club" and dress up nice for some "Formal Slams."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 702
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Action Bronson joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to showcase his wrestling moves with "Bronsonmania," watch some "White People Dancing,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 723
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling keep their area free from "Space Invaders," nap hard after a "Slumber Punch," and see just how weird it gets when cats get their paws on "Too Much Nip."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, and with a whole new stage, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling "Do It For The Vine", bust out their 3D glasses for the category "3Diculousness" and watch some old folks slam in the "Grey Games".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, basketball great Metta World Peace joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to play "Metta Ball," having a job when you're "Here For The Discount,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, business guru Marcus Lemonis shows us his "Lemonis Face", teaches us the 3Ps of "People, Process, Pain" and finally discovers that "They Do Exist!".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness singer/songwriter/producer Mike Posner joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to take TOO MANY PILLS, explore some BROMANTIC BONDS and learn about WHITE GIRL PROBLEMS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 25
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate summer vacation by getting SAND BLASTED, take a trip to PAINLAND and party with THE BANG GANG.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop producer and hit maker DJ Mustard joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to put MUSTARD ON EVERYTHING, suffer through a COLD SUMMER, and celebrate the greatest HEY MAKERS of all time.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 820
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling take the "Running Man Challenge," explore the fear known as "Crap-nophobia" and learn what it means to be "Saved To Death."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 24
programme.desc: On an all-new remix episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo swap places as Chanel teaches that CUTE KILLS, Steelo warns about DEATH CARTS and Rob shows how people get down with PPP

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop legend DJ Paul joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to get a little ZAP HAPPY, live the JUGG LIFE, and get energized by some BEATSPIRATION.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 17
programme.desc: On a special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel get down with the bros as they view the world in BRO-MOTION, learn what it means to be BRO-PROOF, and study the special bro bond IN BRO WE TRUST.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 717
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-winning producer and DJ, Diplo, joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling save the day with "Peacekeepers," get crazy with "Mad Indecent Block Parties,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling spot some "Man Dolphins", hit some red "Bullseyes" and get wet in the category "Dammmmp Daniel."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 11
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the holiday season by fighting through BLACK AND BLUE FRIDAY, GETTIN' UGLY with Christmas sweaters, and spinning some HUMAN DREIDELS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 809
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo fly solo as they learn how dangerous it is to be born with "Turtle Blood", get in shape with "Beast 90x" and learn the advantages to being 100% "Prank Proof".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 16
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo choke down some STREET MEAT, party with a few SLITER SISTERS and hit the stairs with some extreme SLINKIES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 724
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling have rapper/producer Sage the Gemini on the show to find out if he's "Glide Or Die," get "Over Gassed," and announce to the world "I Love Sparks!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 821
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedy icon Wanda Sykes joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to have "Unpresidential Nipples," doling out "Momforcement," and the first-ever "Wandamania."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-nominated recording artist Redfoo joins Rob, Stee-Lo and Chanel to talk about the " Legends Of Campfoo", going "Lights Out" and learn what it means to get "Party Rock'd".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 21
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Young M.A joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to talk about people who have HOT SAUCE, the meaning of RED LYFE, and the joy of CASH BATHS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 10
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, motivational speaker Michael Crossland joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to teach us the CROSSLAND METHOD, show us what it means when your dog is CROSS-BRED, and visit the FIELD OF NIGHTMARES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 716
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel try out some "Competitive Sleeping," experience the confusion of "Creature Shock" and go too hard on a "Sunday Doneday."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop star Vic Mensa joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to check out some close calls in STILL ALIVE, learn creative ways to SAVE MORE MONEY and get extra strange with A LOT GOING ON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 17
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, singer-songwriter Jessie J joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to learn how to DO IT LIKE A DUDE, hear some harsh truths in MOM-SPLAINING and watch the bodies slam in BANG BANG.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Music producer Clinton Sparks teaches Rob, Chanel, and Steelo how to make budget beats with SPARKS OF GENIUS, get cultured with some MASSHOLES, and cause some serious mom damage with MAMA TRAUMA.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 4
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop and R&B singer Ty Dolla $ign joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to check out some SIDE SHOWS, do a little NECK PREP, and find the hottest PORTA-PARTIES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 27
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, we celebrate the world of NASCAR, with a salute to PASS MASTERS, an introduction to NASCAR EXITS, and a look at what happens when people get PAVEMENTAL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate a RUSSIAN THANKSGIVING, feel the wrath of some TEENY MEANIES and plug in with VIRTUAL RETIREMENT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 815
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-winning rapper and producer T-Pain joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to sweeten the sound of people's slams in "T-Pain Your Pain", talk about "Hard 180s"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy nominated singer-songwriter and actress Christina Milian joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to be amazed by some SUPERHUMANS, give some restaurants an F-RATING, and be terrorized by some FEATHER SHARKS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 828
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob shows Chanel and Sterling the animal mastery of "Beast Lords," the tragedy of having a "Craptastrophe" and the dangers of flying "Foot Bombs."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 818
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling see the secret skills it takes to be an "Undercover Badass," find a new way of "Gettin' Paid" and learn that some things are simply "Unforgivable."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 729
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by pop singer Zara Larsson to go "Beast Catching," shed some "Beyonce Tears," and sing along to the "Worstest Love Of All."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo attend some BRO BURIALS, hang with a crew of LIL' TRUNKIES and teach us a new trend called SPEED BUMPING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 9
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Stranger Things actor Gaten Matarazzo joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo for a terrifying special episode as they witness PURE TERROR, get a TASTE OF THE GRAVE and try to avoid the DEMOGORGONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 28
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by country musician Wheeler Walker, Jr. to discuss his BANNED MATES, analyze grooming techniques in MUFF MAINTENANCE, and explore the embarrassment of PREMATURE RELEASES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 18

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 726
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling welcome model Ireland Baldwin to celebrate some "Bald Wins," run afoul of some "Trash Horses" and learn the difficulties of having "Outside Deficit Disorder."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness rapper 21 Savage joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to go into SAVAGE MODE, update the dictionary with WORD BIRTHERS and prove you never know when a random object ISSA WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 26

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel take a much needed "Karate Break", try to figure out what's wrong with some highly "Defective Pets", and play a classic game of "Heads Or Tails?"

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass and Wildboyz star Chris Pontius joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling get up close in some "All-Natural Weirdness," dance with some "Party Boys,"

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Probably: The boys build a church-shaped shack to live in and listen to Cartman the preacher man. Meanwhile, Satan turns to an unlikely source for advice about his relationship woes.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: 4th Grade: The boys enter the 4th grade and take a fast dislike to their new teacher, Ms Choksondik. Meanwhile, Mr Garrison realises he needs to acknowledge and confront his "gay side". (S4, E11)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Trapper Keeper: Cartman is none too happy when 'Bill Cosby' tells him his ultra-advanced Trapper Keeper 2000 is destined to become sentient and wipe out humanity. That kinda sucks ay? (S4, E12)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Helen Keller! The Musical: The boys stage a Thanksgiving play about the life of author Helen Keller, starring Timmy as Helen. There's trouble involving his favourite turkey, Gobbles. (S4, E13)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Fat Camp: Cartman is sent to fat camp in order to resolve his weight problem but all is not as it seems when he returns skinny. Kenny gets his own TV show where he performs disgusting acts. (S4, E15)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The Wacky Molestation Adventure: Kyle has his parents arrested so he can go to a concert but things get out of hand and it's not long before there are no adults left in town! (S4, E16)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: A Very Crappy Christmas: When Mr Hankey fails to show up at Christmas time the boys go looking for him in the sewers. Can the gang revive the spirit of Christmas with their own cartoon? (S4, E17)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 423
programme.desc: 8-year-old contorting quintuplets from Romania defect to the United States and seek shelter with Stan's family.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It Hits The Fan: Swearing on a TV show leads to mass profanity in South Park. What does this have to do with The Black Death?! The you-know-what-hits the fan 162 times in this ep! (S5, E01)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cr***le Fight: It's Timmy vs. Jimmy! But does Jimmy know this? The boys are joining the Scouts (troop 69) but their parents aren't so sure when they discover who the Scout Leader is. (S5, E02)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After the other boys explain to Cartman that pubes don't count unless you grow your own, Cartman realizes he's been tricked by the school bully, Scott Tenorman.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip - Behind The Blow: The boys face death at the hands of some unhinged environmentalists unless they can re-unite Terrance and Phillip for a show at Earth Day Festival! (S5, E05)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cartmanland: When Cartman inherits $1million and purchases his own theme park, Stan starts to question his faith in God. It's not long before things start to go out of control for Cartman. (S5, E06)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Proper Condom Use: After Cartman and Stan play "red rocket" with their dogs, their parents decide it's time for some school sex education. What the school provides creates worse problems! (S5, E07)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Towelie: Stan's mother buys the boys a console called The Okama Gamesphere but it is stolen whilst they are at school. To get it back they must help a talking towel take on the government! (S5, E08)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants: The boys send $1 to Afghan children and receive a goat back. When they try to return it an adventure ensues! First episode to air after 9/11. (S5, E09)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: How To Eat With Your Butt: It's school photo time. Kenny decides to play a prank by wearing his parka upside down and revealing his buttocks. Cartman decides to take it a step further. (S5, E10)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Token is tired of being the only rich kid in town, and succeeds in attracting several other wealthy families to South Park.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Butters' Very Own Episode: Butters' mum asks him to spy on his dad, however what he discovers leaves Mrs Stoch acting slightly unhinged. Will this be the end of our lil blonde haired buddy? (S5, E14)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 514
programme.desc: Kenny Dies: When Kenny is diagnosed with a terminal illness, Stan takes it especially hard. Will Cartman's truck load of foetuses help with a cure? Or does he have other plans for them... (S5, E13)

programme.title: South Park S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy pull together a group of people like themselves and call their new club the "Crips."

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 703
programme.desc: Toilet Paper: Mrs. Dreibel gives the boys detention for making a phallus out of clay in art class. Angry, they take revenge by toilet papering her house. Officer Barbrady is on their trail. (S7, E03)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: Cancelled: The boys get a sense of deja vu as Cartman again has an anal probe, but they soon realise they're actually stuck in some kind of re-run - Earth is just a reality show for aliens! (S7, E01)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: Fat Butt and Pancake Head: When Cartman wins a diversity event with his offensive hand puppet impersonation of Jennifer Lopez, Kyle is enraged. Soon the real J-Lo turns up, mightily peeved! (S7, E05)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: Lil' Crime Stoppers: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny decide to play detective; they go around the town solving minor "crimes" for a dollar. It's not long before they're busting meth labs! (S7, E06)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 707
programme.desc: Red Man's Greed: When the entire town is bought out by a Native American casino, the boys come up with a plan to get their homes back - but is more gambling really the solution? (S7, E07)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 708
programme.desc: South Park is Gay! The TV show Queer Eye For The Straight Guy is sweeping the nation and the men of South Park are embracing metrosexuality, but what evil plan are the hosts plotting? (S7, E08)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: Christian Hard Rock: The boys form a band called Moop, but disagree on what direction they should take. Cartman leaves the band and bets them he will have a platinum record first! (S7, E09)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: Casa Bonita: Cartman is overjoyed at going to a Mexican restaurant for Kyle's birthday but is crushed when he finds out Butters is invited instead. He'll have to make Butters "disappear". (S7, E11)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 712
programme.desc: All About The Mormons: A new family moves to South Park and their son Gary is an unusually perfect Mormon - this angers the boys no end! Will Stan beat him up or go for a family dinner?! (S7, E12)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: Butt Out: When the boys' smoking leads to a nasty incident, it's the cigarettes that are blamed rather than them. Cue the glutinous Rob Reiner to arrive in town with his anti-smoking lobby! (S7, E13)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: Raisins: When Wendy breaks up with Stan he takes it hard. The boys decide to take him to the restaurant Raisins, where all of the employees are preteen girls who enjoy wearing heavy make-up. (S7, E14)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The children of South Park are attracted to "Mr. Jefferson," the new neighbor in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get "Mr. Jefferson" to love him best.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall-Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: The Passion of the Jew: After seeing 'The Passion of the Christ' a zealous Cartman taunts Kyle. When Stan and Kenny see it, they hate it and harass a crazed Mel Gibson for their money back! (S8, E03)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: You Got F'd in the A: The boys get 'served' by some kids from the O.C. so now 'it's on!'. Stan puts together a dance troupe who must compete in the dance-off. Will Randy's moves save them? (S8, E04)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: Pre-School: The boys are pooping their pants after hearing that Trent, a notorious bully from their pre-school years, is being released from juvenile hall - guess who put him there? (S8, E10)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: Quest For Ratings: When the gang's school news programme trails far behind Craig's show, "Animals Close-Up With a Wide-Angle Lens", they pledge to boost their ratings - how far will they go? (S8, E11)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset: Paris Hilton opens a store in South Park, corrupting the town's girls in the process. It's up to Mr Slave to put things right - time for a "***** off!" (S8, E12)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.desc: The boys set up a talent agency and pool all their resources and impress their first client only to have another agency steal him away.

programme.title: Open Windows

programme.desc: With the 15 Division restructure looming, Andy and Sam’s wedding lets the gang celebrate one last hurrah.

programme.title: On the Ropes
programme.desc: Amy and Caleb train one of Sam’s rescue horses to be a roping horse. Jack and Tim disagree about Blue’s future

programme.title: Spark to Flame
programme.desc: Amy’s surprised to learn Finn has returned to town. Jack and Tim win Hudson’s Entrepreneur of the Year Award.

programme.title: Higher Ground
programme.desc: When flood evacuees come to Hudson, Amy works with a traumatized horse. Jack and Lisa help a young couple.

programme.title: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Amy helps a unique animal from an abandoned zoo. Jack and Lisa work through difficulties in their relationship

programme.title: Vigil
programme.desc: A storm leads to a sad goodbye and the return of old friends. Lou reads Katie’s journal without permission.

programme.title: Running Down a Dream
programme.desc: Amy teaches Lyndy how to barrel race. Logan’s father arrives at Heartland. Katie gets her ears pierced.

programme.title: True Colours, New Tricks
programme.desc: Amy leads a trail ride to help with Jessica’s new photography job. Lou’s latest mayoral event upsets Rick.

programme.title: Lurking in the Shadows
programme.desc: Amy and Lou go on a road trip to stop a Miracle Girl imposter. Amy questions if she should visit Finn.

programme.title: Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Amy agrees to let Logan take the lead with a new client horse. Lou struggles to reconnect with Katie.

programme.title: Memory
programme.desc: A surprise visitor causes Amy to see Finn differently. Lou and Peter’s dinner party doesn’t go as planned.

programme.title: Striking a Balance
programme.desc: Amy helps Lisa with Platinum Bow. Tim has a difficult visit with Shane. Katie leads a strike at Maggie’s.

programme.title: Learning to Fly
programme.desc: Amy helps Georgie rediscover her passion for showjumping. A Winter Fair allows Tim to help Jessica.

programme.title: A Light in the Dark
programme.desc: Jack faces the truth about his rift with Al Cotter. Lou and Peter take the next step in their relationship.

programme.title: The Path Less Traveled
programme.desc: Amy is surprised when a very pregnant Mallory shows up at the ranch with a wild horse.

programme.title: Taking the Reins
programme.desc: Amy and Jack retrain Edwin’s horse for carriage racing, bringing Amy and Edwin closer.

programme.title: The Heart Wants
programme.desc: Amy helps Caleb with his son’s pony. Lou and Jessica start a new venture, while Katie tries a risky new hobby.

programme.title: A Piece Apart
programme.desc: Amy must deal with Lyndy’s sudden fear of horses. Logan blames himself for Miley’s accident.

programme.title: How to Say Goodbye
programme.desc: Amy and Jack train Blue for a competition. Lisa deals with a difficult loss. Katie secretly buys a dirt bike.

programme.title: Heat of the Moment
programme.desc: Amy has a run in with an old friend that leads to heartache. Jack and Lisa prove they can be adventurous.

programme.title: Unknown Caller
programme.desc: Lou’s forced to face the reason for her insomnia. Jack wins over a prickly dude ranch guest.

programme.title: Harmony
programme.desc: Amy helps a vaulting team ahead of a big competition. Caleb struggles with a tough decision about Carson.

programme.title: Fear is a Liar
programme.desc: Amy and Nathan retrain his horse. Jessica has to heal a rift with Jack.

programme.title: Just the Beginning
programme.desc: An accident puts Shane’s wedding in jeopardy. Heartland Beef faces an uncertain future.

programme.title: There and Back Again
programme.desc: Amy returns from Europe and struggles to adjust to life at Heartland and her relationship with Ty.

programme.title: The Big Red Wall
programme.desc: After Jack makes a major announcement, Lou plans a party and forces Jack into an awkward reunion.

programme.title: Severed Ties
programme.desc: Amy’s attempts to reunite with Georgie are continually thwarted by the arrival of lavish gifts from afar.

programme.title: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: A surprise visitor arrives at Heartland and makes a declaration that has serious consequences for Amy.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Taxi driver Liam's gambling habit prevents him from buying a reward present for his daughter when she passes her exams, so he burgles a fare's house but becomes obsessed with the house owner.

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mo Murray runs a hair salon with her friend Sue on an estate riven by gang violence. When Sue's son Sean is shot dead, Mo spearheads a local group informing on drug dealers in the area.

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Peter Cartwright engages Charlotte, a nurse, to tend his dying wife Katherine. Several months after Katherine's death, he begins to date Charlotte, eventually marrying her.

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Stephen Cartwright begins his sentence at an understaffed young offender unit. His wing officer, Tina Dakin, is concerned at his withdrawn attitude and attempts to prevent him from killing himself.

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After a row with a drunken bigot, crossdresser Simon gets into a taxi with Tony Baines. Tony is fascinated by Simon's alter ego Tracie and the two begin an affair.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Plumber Willy Houlihan is all set to leave his wife and three children for his girlfriend Michelle when his daughter Laura announces her forthcoming wedding.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Jojo and Bobby get a rude awakening when the Garda come looking for their flat mate Eddie, who is suspected of dealing drugs.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A mysterious newcomer appears to re-open Raw and reunite the old team. But will her plans be thwarted at the last minute?

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Fiona and Geoff use all of their savings to refurbish Raw — a high-risk strategy in Ireland's tough economic climate. Opening night is a success but a sudden robbery occurs.

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Fiona is upbeat on her 40th birthday, until the gang receives news that the Raw building is to be sold.

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Everyone is surprised when Jojo returns to Raw with a ring on her finger and a new husband in tow.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Jojo is looking forward to Eddie's homecoming party — and more specifically, to drinking enough to forget about Bobby flirting with Rebecca.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Shane and Jojo's domestic bliss is wrecked by an unexpected visit from their mother, Maeve. She in turn gets a nasty shock when Shane's arrest is revealed.

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kate rebuffs Shane's morning-after advances, Maeve prepares for her first day at Trinity College and the Raw staff seeks to recover from the robbery.

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When they return home to find the flat wrecked by Jojo's impromptu house party, Kate tells Shane it's high time his sister moved out.

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Anthony is offered a job that conflicts with Jojo’s position at Raw. Kate bristles at Shane and Zoe's budding relationship and Fiona realizes that there is more to Max.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tanya's husband Mal goes back to his old ways and Geoff threatens to leave unless he gets a raise.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The whole restaurant is in shock when a customer suddenly falls ill. Meanwhile, Fiona's past catches up to her and Cupid's bow threatens to strike Jojo.

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Wracked with guilt since she slept with Bobby, Jojo must choose between him and Dylan. Meanwhile, Shane struggles to cope with his parents' separation and Pavel's romance.

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With Jojo suffering a raging hangover and Fiona gone from the restaurant, it's up to Geoff to keep the show on the road.

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: As Kate prepares for the opening of her pop-up shop, Jojo has second thoughts about walking out on Raw for her dream honeymoon.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Shane has to make some hard choices when his wife finally tracks him down. Meanwhile, an old rival provides an unlikely answer to Tanya and Mal's problems.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Pavel delivers devastating news to Geoff. Meanwhile, Jojo discovers Dylan's secret past.

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jojo and Dylan enjoy their new status as an engaged couple, but Maeve nearly pushes Jojo over the edge while pressing her to plan a traditional white wedding.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: As news of an escape spreads, Vera attempts to tighten security.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The payroll robbery goes disastrously wrong. Lynn goes into labour.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Doreen and Franky masquerade as nuns to con people into giving them money.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 16

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 17

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Barbara has drugs smuggled into the prison.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Bea is furious to learn from Vera that Barbara is inside for smuggling drugs.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 20

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Doreen starts behaving like a Franky clone, and Lizzie hears from her brother.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Barbara's hearing manages to cast doubt on her aunt's impartiality, thanks to Vera.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Doreen bullies Barbara, who barricades herself in her cell.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Doreen tries to apologise to Barbara, and Karen's retrial drags up painful memories.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Karen's appeal seems to be going badly, and Lynn gets into trouble at work.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 26
programme.desc: The shoplifter's identity is revealed, and her story immediately makes an impression.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Susan's husband sues for custody of their children, and Vera learns about George.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Lizzie and Doreen hatch a plan that involves breaking into the governor's office.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 29
programme.desc: A shocking incident on a daytime TV show leads to a return to prison for one woman.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 30
programme.desc: Lizzie makes a grim discovery in the laundry. Monica makes a bid to take over as Top Dog.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 31
programme.desc: When Bea learns she will be going back to Wentworth soon, she escapes from the hospital.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 32
programme.desc: Meg is suspicious when she finds a pack of Bea's cigarettes.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 33
programme.desc: Bea returns to Mum's flat, furious over Judith-Anne lying to her. Val calls the police.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 34
programme.desc: Lizzie tells Doreen she intends to try to get back in Monica's favour.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 35

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 36
programme.desc: The police turn up at Val's place and arrest Bea, returning her to Wentworth.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 37
programme.desc: Meg and Greg are nervous around each other after spending the night together.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 38
programme.desc: Erica cancels all privileges, and tightens security following the garden party.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 39
programme.desc: Clara cements her popularity with the women by getting Monica to leave Irene alone.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 36
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 37
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A scientist creates an android that has the qualities which he feels he's lacking.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A US naval destroyer investigates a mysterious tapping sound coming from a sunken submarine.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl who lost her parents in a fire doesn't speak because she has grown up in a secret telepathic community.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jess-Belle enlists the aid of a local witch who casts a spell that makes Billy-Ben fall in love with her.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A three-man spacecraft lands on a planet only to discover the wreckage of a spacecraft identical to their own.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A reporter finds himself trapped in a small town where the people have extraordinary powers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Vollmer, a small-time neo-Nazi, takes advice from a shadowy benefactor on how to increase his followers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A lonely man falls in love with a mini museum doll, which he believes is alive.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: A man makes a deal with the devil to ensure the success of his newspaper.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A man travels back in time to try to prevent some of history's catastrophes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: An astronaut arrives back on Earth, then notices things have changed in his absence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A man considers several possibilities when offered one wish by a genie.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The curator of a murderers' row in a soon-to-be-defunct wax museum persuades the owner to let him keep the figures for awhile.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A bored, wealthy businessman gets a chance to go back in time and start over, armed with all the knowledge he's acquired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Toy designer Horace Ford spends most of his time reminiscing about his idyllic childhood. But when he gets a chance to go back to those years he gets a bitter taste of reality.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: A man named Benteen leads a colony of Americans stranded on a desert planet for 30 years.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: A young couple book passage on a trans-Atlantic cruise, hoping to salvage their marriage.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: An untalented would-be writer's career takes off when the ghost of William Shakespeare writes his script.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Soft music, candles, and a lifeless body dressed in lovely lingerie. These are the trademarks of 'The Casanova Killer,' a serial murderer who leaves only a stain of blood near the heart, and the sole of a foot marred by an 'X,' as forensic evidence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and Steve investigate a private eye's murder in the not-very-pretty world of modeling.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A cardiologist and two business partners plot a deadly insurance scam.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A terrorist bombing ignites an undercover investigation involving an ambitious cop.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan finds a murder victim among the trauma patients from a major bus accident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A senator's drug-addicted daughter is killed during an altercation with her father, but a senior aide covers up the incident as an overdose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and a headstrong attorney (Piper Laurie) investigate a drive-by shooting at a high school.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's daughter (Stacy Van Dyke) escapes from her abusive husband---a trucker who turns up murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The head pediatric nurse is an ex-prostitute whose former madam is murdered after revealing that she's going to publish a tell-all book.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan searches for clues to solve the decades-old murder of his mentor at the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan recruits his friend Ben Matlock (Andy Griffith) to defend Jesse, who's accused of the murder of a resident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Conclusion. With Jesse falsely accused, Ben Matlock (Andy Griffith) pieces together the evidence to find the real killer of Eric Spindler.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Mike Connors reprises his former role as tough-guy PI Joe Mannix, who gets assistance from Dr. Sloan to tackle an unsolved 1973 murder case.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: The investigation of a country star's murder revolves around a driven TV producer (Barbara Mandrell) and her daughter, a timid songwriter.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A psychiatrist murders his estranged wife and frames a patient for the crime.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: A sultry but sinister pharmaceutical rep is dead set on winning the heart of the hospital's chief of staff.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 21
programme.desc: A beach boy involved with a gang member's sister is a suspect in his murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 22
programme.desc: A surgeon (Wayne Rogers) drops dead while he's operating on another doctor (Jack Klugman).

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 23
programme.desc: A pilot of an airliner carrying Dr. Sloan and Amanda to a medical conference in Europe is murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 24
programme.desc: A wealthy woman and her lover concoct an elaborate scheme to do in her husband.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 25
programme.desc: A comedian (Tim Conway) makes a bumbling attempt to do in his more successful former partner (Harvey Korman)---whose wife turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 26
programme.desc: A mad bomber whom Dr. Sloan helped put away has escaped and wants the good doctor blown away.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Steve becomes embroiled in political intrigue after the murder of a city councilman's wife appears to be part of a larger political strategy.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mark investigates when her older lover, a new state Supreme Court Justice, murders a teenage girl.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A Malibu Hills fire is the backdrop for rising tensions between the residents; a disgraced stockbroker, a naturalist, a worried father, and a land developer. A worried Dr. Sloan deals with his own parental fears when Steve helps fight the fire.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Community General is already under increased security, with a high-profile criminal hospitalized, when an important businesswoman is brought in. Mark suspects her security guard has deadly intentions.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tyra surprises the remaining girls with a one-on-one photoshoot to teach each girl how to find their most flattering pose.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A look at never-before-seen footage of the cycle 11 contestants that includes the ladies improvising a rap in the hot tub, one girl revealing a hidden talent and a very candid chat between Tyra and the model wannabes.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The ladies pull a disappearing act for this week’s challenge.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The ladies pack their bags and head overseas to their European destination.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The remaining five girls travel around town by boat for their go sees.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Paulina offers the girls advice on how to successfully model with a variety of items, including fish and toilet paper.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In the cycle 11 finale, the three finalists put their Top Model experience to the test when they shoot their final CoverGirl commercial & print ad.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: 32 young women arrive in LA, only to be whittled down to 13 finalists. After the field was narrowed down to 13 finalists, the girls were sent to their first photoshoot with Nigel Barker as their photographer.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Greeted by Miss J and a high school marching band, the girls were divided into teams and taught a runway walking routine based on timing and precision.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The girls were greeted at Salon Sessions Studio by Tyra, Jay and Miss J for their dramatic makeovers.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: After being pulled over by what they thought was a traffic cop, the girls were taught the art of posing by vogue instructor Benny Ninja.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The girls met with the director of Elite Model Management Cathy Gould and Elite Model Claudia Mason, who taught them all about personal style and how to dress appropriately.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The girls were greeted by Twiggy and ANTM: Cycle Seven participant Melrose who taught them the importance of having a memorable name.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The girls met with actress Tia Mowry (The Game) who taught them how to portray different characters through voice and movement.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The girls were greeted at their house by Cycle 2 participant April, who gave them advice on how to be a correspondent and conduct a good interview.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In this special recap episode, never-before-seen footage about the journey of the five remaining contestants is revealed, including a heated argument between two girls and a staged mock elimination by all the girls.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The girls met with the owner of Priscilla's Model Management, Priscilla Leighton Clark, and Australian model Jodhi Meares, who organized and booked several designers to meet them on Go Sees.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The girls met with Aboriginal Elder Uncle Max and his niece Calita, who taught them about the native Australian art of storytelling through dance.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The three remaining models participated in a national photoshoot for Cover Girl's Lipshine Lip Color and a My Life as a CoverGirl commercial.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The 32 hopeful contestants arrived in a Pasadena hotel to start a runway challenge. Tyra selected the 13 finalists to enter the competition.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After the models battle it out to make the final cut, they are shocked to learn they will be going bald.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After the girls are transformed with makeovers, they are put on ice at a photoshoot and face an ice princess back at the house.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Creepy cockroaches and falling fairy tales test the competitors' limits on the catwalk and in their photoshoot.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The models experience a time for all seasons in a photoshoot after getting tips from supermodel Janice Dickinson

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The models' improvisational skills are tested in a Covergirl commercial, and one lucky girl wins a guest-starring role on Veronica Mars.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: One model shocks everyone when she loses her temper with another competitor; and at a photoshoot, the girls must model shoes while krumping.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 51
programme.desc: In today's elimination contestants are challenged to cook a classic dish. Could this be Reynold's final cook in the MasterChef kitchen?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 52
programme.desc: Today's mystery box is inspired by colour. The dish can be sweet or savoury and contestants can access the pantry with the garden also in play. So why is Melissa so emotional?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 53
programme.desc: In the battle for top 5, contestants must choose two cloches and cook with the ingredients underneath. They can give up one cloche and select a third, however they must cook with the third ingredient.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 54
programme.desc: Do not miss this elimination. Phil Wood from two of Victoria's finest restaurants, reveals a pressure test. Contestants must replicate his dish of potatoes duchess with shiitakes and cauliflower.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 55
programme.desc: The race to finals week is on! The makers of the top three dishes from the mystery box challenge will battle it out tomorrow for one last chance at winning immunity this season.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 56
programme.desc: Who will make the finals? With no set rules in place, the contestants must mutually decide the cook time to create a dish, sweet or savoury, that best proves to the judges they have come back to win.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 57
programme.desc: In today's mammoth elimination challenge, the contestants discover not only will they be cooking a four-course meal for the MasterChef judges, but for some very special guests also.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 58
programme.desc: The contestants discover today's mystery box, covered in a Union Jack flag, has been set by guest chef Gordon Ramsay. Who's first into Grand Finale Week?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 59
programme.desc: In tonight's elimination challenge contestants must choose to use either ingredients from an ordinary pantry or an extraordinary pantry. Which favourite contestant will go?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 60
programme.desc: In today's Semi-Final challenge, our top three contestants compete for a place in the Grand Final. At the end of today's challenge, three become two.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 61
programme.desc: After a long culinary journey the two finalists are competing for a $250,000 cash prize and the title of MasterChef Australia 2020.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The MasterChef kitchen welcomes 12 emerging home cooks and 12 of MasterChef's most loved past contestants. Together they will share their love of food and compete to become Australia's next MasterChef.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In a massive service challenge, it's Fans versus Favourites, course versus course in the ultimate three course battle, with the winning teams heading to tomorrow's immunity decider challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Split into four teams across four benches, 12 contestants discover they have 75 minutes on the clock to create a dish using the ingredients from a particular layer of the balanced diet food pyramid.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 4
programme.desc: It's this season's first immunity challenge! Choosing ingredients from mystery cloches, the contestant with the best dish wins immunity and will sit out Sunday's elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's the first elimination of the year! The makers of the best jaffle in round one will be safe, but the chef with the least satisfying dish that changed their life" in round two will go home."

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Contestants must create a dish using the same ingredients that were in the very first mystery box in MasterChef season one, The least impressive fare will send their chefs to a pressure test cook-off.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dessert king Adriano Zumbo returns to the MasterChef kitchen for a pressure test like no other. The contestant with the least impressive take on Zumbo's Polly Want A Waffle will be sent home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Four teams vie for a shot at immunity in the infamous team relay challenge. This time, teams won't even know the mystery ingredient until the clock starts ticking! Plus, the first Masterclass of 2022.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The Titans wake up in high spirits, but nothing is quite as it seems when a new discovery raises suspicions.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The aftermath of Tribal Council hits home as a strong alliance is left untethered. Can an uncovered mystery give rise to a new power? Or will it cause more friction than ever before?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Both tribes deal with the aftermath of Tribal Council and a hurricane of a different sort comes to Survivor beach. Strategies are questioned. Who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 7
programme.desc: With a pivotal vote out of the way, each tribe begins to turn on one another and a major milestone of the game gets in the way of their plans.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 8
programme.desc: After an epic blindside one tribe is divided, and another is out for revenge. And after a chaotic scramble, where no one believes anyone, anything can happen at Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: One castaway is left grovelling. Meanwhile, a mouth-watering reward is up for grabs, but can it be enough to strengthen tribe mate suspicions?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Is it worth taking a chance with a new alliance or should you trust someone again? Anything can happen at Tribal Councilâ€¦

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The aftermath of last night's Tribal Council lingers and revenge is on the cards. An endurance challenge could see a rising star emerge and Tribal Council isn't quite as it seems.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A second chance is up for grabs, and a Reward twist changes the power dynamics of the two dominant alliances. Who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: An alliance still reeling from an earlier vote leads to all-out war, but their plan to avenge their friend's blindside leads to outbursts and twists at Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Divided more than ever after the previous tribal, a feud continues to rampage through the tribe, tearing alliances apart. Who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Newly formed alliances are tested and an epic Reward is up for grabs that could change everything. Who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Eleven contestants remain and an opportunity to take back control of the game is on someone's mind. Where will the votes fall tonight and who will become the first jury member?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 17
programme.desc: As a powerful new alliance sends ripples through the camp, who will stay loyal to friends and alliances, and who will jump ship?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 18
programme.desc: A risky advantage is in play but will an alliance trust enough to help pull it off, or will it all end in failure?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A boy's alliance starts to form, and someone is on a mission to take out a big player. Eight are left. Who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 20
programme.desc: For one, paranoia takes hold for the first time and wounded egos collide after an explosive Tribal Council. Everyone's hungry to make big moves and impress the Jury.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 21
programme.desc: With only five days left, loyalties are tested and powers shift. With only six Survivors left, who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Limitless Win S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Sarah and her mum, Fiona, face the ultimate challenge as they try to climb the never-ending money ladder.

programme.title: Limitless Win S1 Ep. 5
